description: Disproportionate Head (WB5 p. 87). Roll percentile on this sub-table after Step One selects the head.

entries.name: Huge Ears
entries.description: 1D4 times larger than is common; +1D4 to Perception Rolls dealing with sound. Penalties: -2 to P.B. and -20% to Disguise and Undercover Ops skills.

entries.name: Huge Eyes
entries.description: Perfect vision, excellent peripheral vi- sion (can see 180 degrees) and Nightvision (1,000 feet/305 m; increase range an extra 1000 feet if the character already has Nightvision), and +1 to Perception Rolls involving vision in the dark and in dim lighting. Penalties: Light sensitive – sunlight and other bright lights hurt the eyes, cause the character to squint, reduce normal (daylight) vision by half, and -2 to Per- ception Rolls involving vision in well lit areas and daytime.

entries.name: Huge Jaw, Strong Neck
entries.description: +1D6 damage with bite attacks, can hold onto rope with teeth with the same strength and grip as his hands without injury to the neck, and +1 to Hor- ror Factor. Penalties: -1 to P.B. and -20% to Disguise and Un- dercover skills.

entries.name: Huge Nose
entries.description: Keen sense of smell, can track by scent: 20% +4% per level of experience, and +2 to Perception Rolls dealing with scents and odors. Penalties: -2 to save vs gas attacks (including smoke, tear gas, stench, and other strong odors) and -3 to save vs nausea and vomiting resulting from foul odors and airborne toxins.

entries.name: Huge Teeth
entries.description: +1D6 damage to bite attacks, +1 to Horror Factor. Penalty: -1 to P.B.

entries.name: Large Head
entries.description: The entire head is twice as large as usual. +1D4 to I.Q. and +2 to M.E. attributes. Penalties: -1 to P.B. and P.E. attributes, and the character may seem more vul- nerable and unable to defend himself than he really is; -2 from Horror Factor.

entries.name: Large Mouth
entries.description: The mouth is unusually large and creepy, lips may be large and plump or thin; +2 to bite damage and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalty: -1 from P.B.

entries.name: No chin
entries.description: The character’s chin is small, flat, and seems to practically fade into the neck. Penalties: -1 to P.B. and -1 from Horror Factor.

entries.name: Pencil Neck
entries.description: The neck seems unusually thin and long. The advantage is -1 to be hit by a Called Shot to the neck. Penalties: -1D6 S.D.C. and -1 from Horror Factor.

entries.name: Tiny Ears
entries.description: +1 to Perception Rolls dealing with sound.

entries.name: Tiny Eyes
entries.description: Perfect 20/20 vision, but poor peripheral vision (only 90 degrees), +1 to Horror Factor and Perception Rolls. Penalties: -1 to P.B. attribute, -1 to parry and dodge, and is not likely to see anyone sneaking up on him from behind or the side (opponents are +2 to strike with surprise attacks from behind)!

entries.name: Tiny Mouth
entries.description: The mouth is unusually small, practi- cally a slit with no lips, and +1 to Horror Factor. Penalty: -1 from M.A.

entries.name: Tiny Nose
entries.description: +1 to P.B., +2 to save vs gas attacks (in- cluding smoke, tear gas, stench, and other strong odors) and +4 to save vs nausea and vomiting resulting from foul odors and airborne toxins. Penalties: This little button nose has only a fair sense of smell: -10% to identify odors and cannot track by scent and -3 to Perception Rolls dealing with scents and odors. Disproportionate Arms & Hands

entries.name: Tiny Teeth
entries.description: The teeth look like those of a young human child or even smaller, and if the ‘Bane has fangs they are tiny too. The character may have twice as many teeth because they are so small. Penalties: -1 from Horror Factor and any damage from bite attacks is half the normal amount.

entries.name: Very Small Head
entries.description: The head is a small, low-profile target to hit; attackers must make a Called Shot to target it and still suffer a penalty of -3 to strike, +2 to Horror Factor. Pen- alties: -1 to I.Q. and P.B. attributes.
